name: BLT Bites
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: Taste of Home magazine, 93/08-09
1. Cut a thin slice off the top of each tomato.
2. Scoop out and discard the pulp from the center of each tomato.
3. Invert the tomatoes on a paper towel to allow excess moisture to drain away.
4. In a small bowl, combine all remaining ingredients; mix well until evenly distributed.
5. Spoon the mixture into the prepared tomatoes.
6. Refrigerate for several hours before serving.
